name: accounting firms managing 10–20 client retainers/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–20 client retainers/month, overspending causes cash flow gaps. We provide real-time budget monitoring instead of manual tracking spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Overspending on client projects without timely alerts.
